name: Make Ahead Rolled up Pizzas
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the crusts from each slice of bread and roll out with a rolling pin.
2. In a bowl, combine the remaining ingredients except butter, stirring to blend well.
3. Spread each bread slice with some of the mixture.
4. Roll up each slice in a jelly-roll fashion (secure with a toothpick if necessary).
5. Brush each roll-up with melted butter.
6. Place on a baking sheet and chill until serving time.
7. When ready to serve, place the roll-ups in a preheated oven set to 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 12 to 15 minutes.
8. Serve hot with chilled soup.
